mapper.select: SELECT b.IDX, b.TITLE, b.USER_ID, b.CONTENT, b.BOARD_TYPE, b.COUNT, b.REVIEW_STAR AS review_star, u.USER_NAME AS user_name, b.CREATED_AT AS createdat FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON b.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE b.BOARD_TYPE = #{board_type} ORDER BY b.IDX DESC

SELECT b.IDX, b.TITLE, b.USER_ID, b.CONTENT, b.BOARD_TYPE, b.COUNT, b.REVIEW_STAR AS review_star, u.USER_NAME AS user_name, b.CREATED_AT AS createdat FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON b.USER_ID = u.USER_ID
b.BOARD_TYPE = #{board_type}
AND b.${searchField} LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY b.IDX DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( IDX, TITLE, USER_ID, CONTENT, BOARD_TYPE, REVIEW_STAR, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{user_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content}, #{board_type}, #{review_star}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT b.IDX, b.TITLE, b.USER_ID, b.CONTENT, b.BOARD_TYPE, b.COUNT, b.LIKED, b.COMMENT_CNT, b.REVIEW_STAR AS review_star, u.USER_NAME AS user_name, b.CREATED_AT AS createdat FROM BOARD b LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON b.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE b.IDX = #{idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE IDX = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.*, u.USER_NAME as user_name FROM board b LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON b.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE b.board_type = 'review' ORDER BY b.idx DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
